summary: Global tensions are escalating across multiple fronts, with Iran-US hostilities intensifying following new American military strikes and Iranian missile attacks, while a landmark US-Saudi Arabia civilian nuclear cooperation deal signals a significant regional realignment in the Middle East. In Ukraine, leadership changes continue as the new military chief vows escalated retaliation against Russia while top US and Russian diplomats discuss the war in Manila. Tech giants face mounting pressures from spiraling artificial intelligence costs and alleged intellectual property theft, while China's trade tensions with North America threaten sectors from Canadian dairy to broader supply chains. Humanitarian crises persist across Gaza, Bangladesh, and the Democratic Republic of Congo, with protracted conflicts complicating recovery efforts and raising international accountability questions.
